items.caption:

#jesusgeneration #forrestfrank #worship #jesusjams
items.ownerFullName: Corinne Burghardt 🏡 ✨ Slay At Home Mother

items.caption:
Our oldest is 16!!! I had to make a card box for him for his first car fund 😉. This was such a fun project to make, and I’m so thankful for the many people that showed up to shower him with love, help with setup and clean up, and let our young man know and see how loved he is! 🥹🩷 #thunderlaserpartner 

What’s funny is his actual birthday was back in January BUUUUT it was going to be hard to make his dream of a backyard BBQ type of party a reality in the middle of winter 😆😅 so we postponed it to May for him 🥰.

So this kiddo essentially got TWO birthday celebrations this year for the same birthday 🤪 

I was going to make this into an SVG project with a full blog post but I’m glad I waited because I didn’t make it nearly deep enough to fit all the cards he got 😆 

Lessons were learned, but my laser cutting machine is a beast so I accomplished exactly what I envisioned, and I’m so thankful to have this beauty of a machine to craft with! 

Materials used:
@thunderlaserusa Nova Plus 35 60W
Pre-painted wood (I pre-painted them myself 👋)
Glue

I like to ‘score’ my designs before I cut them - it makes placement SOOOO much easier, highly recommend 😍🙌

#lasercutter #thunderlaser #crafts #craftwithme
items.ownerFullName: Corinne Burghardt 🏡 ✨ Slay At Home Mother
items.transcript: I want to rock right now. I'm Rob Base and I came to get down. I'm not internationally known, but I'm known to rock the microphone because I get stupid, I mean outrageous. Stay away from me if you're contagious, cause I'm the winner. No, I'm not a loser. To be an emcee is what I choose. The ladies love me, girls adore me. Even the ones who never saw me like the way that I rhyme at a show. The reason why, man, I don't know, so let's go, cause it takes two to make a thing go right. It takes two to make it out of sight.

items.caption:
Wife of the year 🏆 - now when are we gonna do stuff in the yard?? 🍂 😆😍

Juuuust kidding (kind of 😉)

My husband is a major dart player / fanatic - is there a certain term or name for that?? Idk, educate me because I’m still learning what all the hit combos are named (Big Fish, Low Ton, etc. 😅🙏)

Also - if your husband wants to play my husband on Gran Board, let me know and we can set up a virtual play date for them 😉

Materials used:
@thunderlaserusa Nova Plus 35 #thunderlaserpartner ⚡️
1/4” black matte acrylic
3M adhesive tape 

This project took me about 30 minutes to do on the laser, including time to design my antlers and size/measure everything 🥰 this laser machine is so great at cutting and engraving all the projects I come up with and throw in the bed 😆💪

Comment LASER and I’ll send you the deets for my laser cutter ⚡️👇👇👇

#laserprojects #lasercutter #thundernovaplus #crafts

items.caption:
We looooove a @stemville play date 😍🙌 it’s honestly one of my favorite spots to go with the kids because, while we certainly help clean up our mess after we’re done - I don’t have to host and clean up at my own house 😆.

Orrrrr buy a million toys for our kids and all their friends to entertain with 😅🫶 Stemville does it for me!

Be sure to follow @stemville so you can learn more about their events, play schedule, and more 😍

#stemlearning #stem #playdatefun #howellmi #stemville
items.ownerFullName: Corinne Burghardt 🏡 ✨ Slay At Home Mother

items.caption:
My kids are better at making friends than I am (or ever was 😆) and this isn’t to slam public school.

But the question (and faces that I think most people don’t realize accompany the question when asked) still makes me cringe inside. 

While I acknowledge that homeschooling can have a bad rap - so can anything else. Including public school 🤷‍♀️ but if you do it right - it can be a really beautiful dynamic shift for your family. 

Do my kids drive me bananas some days? YEP. 🍌 
Homeschooling isn’t all sunshine and rainbows. 

But playdates with friends are, as are library trips, going to museums, camping - we have a circle of close friends and a circle of acquaintances that we very much enjoy hanging out with. 

In fact, my social battery is drained most days now 🫣😆 

#homeschool #homeschoolfun #socialization #homemaking

musicInfo.song_name: Be Young, Be Foolish, Be Happy

items.ownerFullName: Corinne Burghardt 🏡 ✨ Slay At Home Mother
items.transcript: Be young, be foolish, but be happy. Be young, be foolish, but be happy. Don't let the rain get you down, it's a waste of time. Have your fun, live every day in the bright sunshine. It's the same old story all over the world. Girl needs boy and boy needs girl. So be young, be foolish, but be happy. Be young, be foolish, but be happy.

items.caption:
TEAMWORK TASKS - as a homeschool mom, we’ve learned a ton about how to manage conflict with each other, with friends, and with new playmates at co-ops or parks. 

What works at home for us is our new teamwork tasks system 😉. Don’t get me wrong - we still practice working through things, but it’s also important to know how to work together towards a common goal with someone you might not be getting along with perfectly, too.

This comes up in the future with friends, family, neighbors, spouses, kids, coworkers, etc. 

It isn’t a punishment, either. It’s a redirection. 👍 

It’s been working really well for us for our 6 year old and 10 year old, as a reference, but I could see it working for kids of almost any age too 🙌

Do you do something similar to this? What’s your go-to system? 😍👇👇👇

#homeschoolmom #momof3kids #cleaning #cleanhome🏡 #summertimefun
